harness.js:37:4-67:7
> cp["exec"](("lsof -i tcp:" + port), function(err, d) {
  d = d["split"]("
");
  var data = [];
  var headers = d[0]["toLowerCase"]()["split"]("/\s+/");
  headers["forEach"](function(v, k) { if ((v === "")) { delete headers[k]; } });
  delete d[0];
  d["pop"]();
  d["forEach"](function(v) {
  v = v["split"]("/\s+/");
  var k = {};
  var finalField = v[headers["length"]];
  if (finalField) {
    k["state"] = finalField["substring"](1, (finalField["length"] - 1))["toLowerCase"]();
    v["pop"]();
  }
  v["forEach"](function(s, i) { k[headers[i]] = s; });
  data["push"](k);
});
  fn(data);
});

Reached sensitive command-injection sink 'child_process.exec' with symbolic expr:
(str.++ "lsof -i tcp:" payload)
